query:
-- Update users.openId from 'phone:XXXXXXXXXX' to 'phone:+1XXXXXXXXXX' for 10-digit numbers
UPDATE users
SET openId = CONCAT('phone:+1', SUBSTRING(openId, 7))
WHERE openId LIKE 'phone:%'
  AND openId NOT LIKE 'phone:+%'
  AND LENGTH(SUBSTRING(openId, 7)) = 10;

-- Update users.openId from 'phone:1XXXXXXXXXX' to 'phone:+1XXXXXXXXXX' for 11-digit numbers starting with 1
UPDATE users
SET openId = CONCAT('phone:+', SUBSTRING(openId, 7))
WHERE openId LIKE 'phone:%'
  AND openId NOT LIKE 'phone:+%'
  AND LENGTH(SUBSTRING(openId, 7)) = 11
  AND LEFT(SUBSTRING(openId, 7), 1) = '1';

-- Update users.openId from 'phone:1XXXXXXXXXX' to 'phone:+1XXXXXXXXXX' for 11-digit numbers starting with 1
UPDATE users
SET openId = CONCAT('phone:+', SUBSTRING(openId, 7))
WHERE openId LIKE 'phone:%'
  AND openId NOT LIKE 'phone:+%'
  AND LENGTH(SUBSTRING(openId, 7)) = 11
  AND LEFT(SUBSTRING(openId, 7), 1) = '1';
